learningObjectives: Recognise and use twelve Starters number and time words from one to twenty.
Ask and answer how many and how old questions at Pre-A1 level.
Read Mai's week text and identify numbers, days and birthday details.
Listen for ages, quantities and times in school and party dialogues.
Write short answers about age, days and o'clock times.
Speak short phrases about numbers, days and Mai's birthday week.
grammarFocus: Question words: how many, how old

vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Trường bắt đầu lúc ba giờ.
Tôi có năm cây bút chì.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Ten friends come to my party.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Mười bạn đến bữa tiệc của tôi.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: There are twenty desks in our class.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Có hai mươi bàn trong lớp chúng tôi.
Sinh nhật tôi vào thứ Ba.
Hôm nay là sinh nhật tôi!

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: The party is at three o'clock.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Bữa tiệc diễn ra lúc ba giờ.

grammarReference.explanation: Dùng số đếm one, two, three … twenty trước danh từ đếm được hoặc sau how old / how many.
commonMistakes: I have three book (×) → I have three books (✓)
She is seven year old (×) → She is seven years old (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Question words: how many, how old
grammarReference.explanation: How many hỏi số lượng (how many books?). How old hỏi tuổi (how old are you?).
examples: How many pencils do you have?
I am eight. / I have five pencils.
commonMistakes: How old books? (×) → How many books? (✓)
How many are you? (×) → How old are you? (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Nhận biết Monday, Tuesday … và today, birthday. Dùng on + ngày: on Tuesday.
commonMistakes: Today is Monday day (×) → Today is Monday (✓)
My birthday is Tuesday (×) → My birthday is on Tuesday (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Numbers One to Five
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use one, two, three, four and five in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Numbers 1–5
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best number.

questions.questionText: I have _____ brother. His name is Nam.
questions.explanation: One (một) — Mai có một anh trai trong unit.

choices.distractorNote: Hai anh trai — không đúng câu chuyện Mai

questions.questionText: One plus one is _____.
questions.explanation: Two (hai) — 1 + 1 = 2.

questions.questionText: Mai reads _____ books at school on Monday.
questions.explanation: Three (ba) — bài đọc: we read three books.

questions.questionText: Which number comes after three?
questions.explanation: Four (bốn) — thứ tự: one, two, three, four, five.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Numbers 1–5
exercises.instructions: Match each number to its meaning.

questions.questionText: Match the numbers to their values.
questions.explanation: Mỗi số khớp giá trị đếm. three và five hay bị đảo.

exercises.title: Check: Numbers 1–5 Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: I have _____ pencils in my bag.
questions.explanation: Five (năm) — câu mẫu unit: I have five pencils.

choices.distractorNote: Một — quá ít cho câu thường gặp

questions.questionText: Which number is between two and four?
questions.explanation: Three (ba) — 2, 3, 4.

questions.questionText: Count: one, two, three, _____, five.
questions.explanation: Four (bốn) — thứ tự đếm cơ bản.

exercises.title: Apply: Numbers in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct number.

questions.questionText: Complete: I have [0] brother. | She has [1] books. | We read [2] books.
questions.explanation: one (một anh trai); two (hai quyển); three (ba quyển ở trường).

content.template: I have [0] brother. She has [1] books. We read [2] books.

exercises.title: Review: Numbers 1–5 Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review. Choose carefully.

questions.questionText: The smallest number here is _____.
questions.explanation: One (1) là số nhỏ nhất trong nhóm 1–5.

questions.questionText: Two plus three equals _____.
questions.explanation: Five (năm) — 2 + 3 = 5.

questions.questionText: Which word is a number, not a day?
questions.explanation: Four là số. Monday và Tuesday là ngày.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Ten, Twenty and Time
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise ten, twenty, o'clock, today and birthday in context.

exercises.title: Learn: Bigger Numbers and Time
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: _____ friends come to Mai's party.
questions.explanation: Ten (mười) — bài đọc: Ten friends will come.

questions.questionText: Our class has _____ desks.
questions.explanation: Twenty (hai mươi) — bài đọc: twenty desks.

questions.questionText: The party is at three _____.
questions.explanation: O'clock (giờ) đi sau số để chỉ thời gian.

choices.distractorNote: Sự kiện, không phải đơn vị giờ

questions.questionText: _____ is my birthday!
questions.explanation: Today (hôm nay) — Today is my birthday!

choices.distractorNote: Ngày cụ thể — câu dùng today

exercises.title: Practice: Match Time Words
exercises.instructions: Match each word to its meaning.

questions.questionText: Match numbers and time words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Ten/twenty là số; o'clock chỉ giờ; birthday là sinh nhật.

pairs.right: used after a number for time

exercises.title: Check: Time Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Happy _____, Mai!
questions.explanation: Birthday (sinh nhật) — Happy birthday!

questions.questionText: Which number is bigger: ten or twenty?
questions.explanation: Twenty (20) lớn hơn ten (10).

choices.distractorNote: Không nằm trong cặp so sánh

questions.questionText: School starts at eight _____.
questions.explanation: O'clock — eight o'clock chỉ giờ.

exercises.title: Apply: Time in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] is Monday. | The party is at three [1]. | [2] friends will come.
questions.explanation: Today; o'clock; ten — theo bài Mai's Birthday Week.

content.template: [0] is Monday. The party is at three [1]. [2] friends will come.

exercises.title: Review: Numbers and Time Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Mai's class has how many desks?
questions.explanation: Twenty desks — từ bài đọc unit.

questions.questionText: Which word means 'hôm nay'?
questions.explanation: Today = hôm nay.

questions.questionText: Which phrase tells the time?
questions.explanation: Three o'clock chỉ giờ. Ten friends nói số lượng.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Days of the Week
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise Monday, Tuesday, today and birthday in Mai's week.

exercises.title: Learn: Monday and Tuesday
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the day word.

questions.questionText: The first day in Mai's story is _____.
questions.explanation: Monday (thứ Hai) — Today is Monday.

choices.distractorNote: Từ chung, không phải tên ngày

questions.questionText: Mai's birthday is on _____.
questions.explanation: Tuesday (thứ Ba) — birthday on Tuesday.

questions.questionText: Tomorrow after Monday is _____.
questions.explanation: Tuesday — thứ tự ngày trong tuần.

choices.distractorNote: Sự kiện, không phải tên ngày

questions.questionText: _____ is a special day when you get one year older.
questions.explanation: Birthday (sinh nhật) — ngày thêm tuổi.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Days and Events
exercises.instructions: Match each word to its meaning.

questions.questionText: Match days and time words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Monday/Tuesday là ngày; today = hôm nay; birthday = sinh nhật.

pairs.right: the first day in Mai's story
a day you celebrate your age

exercises.title: Check: Days Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: Today is Monday. Tomorrow is _____.
questions.explanation: Tuesday — ngày liền sau Monday.

questions.questionText: Which day comes BEFORE Tuesday?
questions.explanation: Monday đứng trước Tuesday.

questions.questionText: The party is on Tuesday at three _____.
questions.explanation: O'clock — chỉ giờ sau số.

exercises.title: Apply: Days in Context
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with day and time words.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] is Monday. | My [1] is on Tuesday. | [2] is special!
questions.explanation: Today; birthday; Today — theo câu chuyện Mai.

content.template: [0] is Monday. My [1] is on Tuesday. [2] is special!

exercises.title: Review: Days and Time Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: Mai reads three books on _____.
questions.explanation: Monday — At school on Monday.

questions.questionText: Which word is NOT a day of the week?
questions.explanation: Birthday là sự kiện. Monday và Tuesday là ngày.

questions.questionText: How many friends come on Tuesday?
questions.explanation: Ten friends — từ bài đọc.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: How Many?
lessons.learningObjective: Use how many to ask about quantities and answer with numbers.

exercises.title: Learn: How Many Questions
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: _____ books do you have? — I have three.
questions.explanation: How many (bao nhiêu) hỏi số lượng danh từ đếm được.

questions.questionText: _____ pencils are in your bag? — Five.
questions.explanation: How many + danh từ số nhiều (pencils).

questions.questionText: Best answer: How many friends are here? — _____
questions.explanation: Ten. / I have ten friends. — trả lời số lượng.

choices.distractorNote: I am ten trả lời tuổi

questions.questionText: How many desks are in the class? — _____
questions.explanation: Twenty — bài đọc: twenty desks.

exercises.title: Practice: How Many Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete the questions and answers.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] books do you read? | I have [1] books. | [2] friends come to the party?
questions.explanation: How many; three; How many — hỏi và trả lời số lượng.

content.template: [0] books do you read? I have [1] books. [2] friends come to the party?

exercises.title: Check: How Many Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: _____ candles are on the cake? — Eight.
questions.explanation: How many hỏi số lượng nến.

questions.questionText: Teacher: How many pencils do you have? Mai: _____
questions.explanation: I have five pencils. — trả lời how many.

questions.questionText: Which question asks about quantity?
questions.explanation: How many friends — số lượng. How old — tuổi.

exercises.title: Apply: Order How Many Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: How / many / books / do / you / have?
questions.explanation: How many books do you have? — How many + danh từ + do you have?

questions.questionText: Make: I / have / ten / friends.
questions.explanation: I have ten friends. — trả lời how many.

exercises.title: Review: How Many Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: How many brothers does Mai have? — _____
questions.explanation: One. — I have one brother (từ unit 1, tiếp nối).

questions.questionText: _____ desks are in our class? — Twenty.
questions.explanation: How many desks — hỏi số lượng bàn.

questions.questionText: Anna asks: How many friends at the party? Best reply:
questions.explanation: Ten friends. — số lượng bạn.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: How Old?
lessons.learningObjective: Use how old to ask about age and answer with I am / He is + number.

exercises.title: Learn: How Old Questions
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: _____ are you? — I am eight.
questions.explanation: How old (bao nhiêu tuổi) hỏi tuổi.

questions.questionText: _____ is your brother Nam? — He is six.
questions.explanation: How old is + người — hỏi tuổi Nam.

questions.questionText: Best answer: How old is Anna? — _____
questions.explanation: She is seven. — trả lời tuổi Anna.

questions.questionText: Mai says: I am eight _____.
questions.explanation: Years old — I am eight years old (có thể rút gọn I am eight).

exercises.title: Practice: How Old Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete the questions and answers.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] old are you? | I [1] eight. | [2] old is Nam? | He [3] six.
questions.explanation: How; am; How; is — How old + am/is + số.

content.template: [0] old are you? I [1] eight. [2] old is Nam? He [3] six.

exercises.title: Check: How Old Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form. No hints.

questions.questionText: Teacher: How old are you today, Mai? Mai: _____
questions.explanation: I am eight today! — trả lời tuổi sinh nhật.

questions.questionText: _____ is Anna? — She is seven.
questions.explanation: How old is Anna? — hỏi tuổi.

questions.questionText: Which sentence tells an age correctly?
questions.explanation: He is six. — đúng mẫu how old.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Age Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: How / old / are / you?
questions.explanation: How old are you? — câu hỏi tuổi chuẩn.

questions.questionText: Make: I / am / eight / years / old.
questions.explanation: I am eight years old. — trả lời tuổi đầy đủ.

exercises.title: Review: How Old Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Nam is Mai's brother. He _____ six.
questions.explanation: He is six — is với he.

questions.questionText: _____ old are they? — They are seven and eight.
questions.explanation: How old are they? — hỏi tuổi nhiều người.

questions.questionText: On her birthday, Mai says: I _____ eight today!
questions.explanation: I am eight today — am với I.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Numbers and Days in Context
lessons.learningObjective: Use numbers, days and time phrases together in short Starters sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Numbers and Days
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word or phrase.

questions.questionText: Today is _____. Tomorrow is Tuesday.
questions.explanation: Monday — hôm nay thứ Hai, mai thứ Ba.

questions.questionText: My birthday is _____ Tuesday.
questions.explanation: On + ngày — on Tuesday.

questions.questionText: The party starts _____ three o'clock.
questions.explanation: At + giờ — at three o'clock.

questions.questionText: There are _____ desks in our class.
questions.explanation: Twenty — số lượng danh từ số nhiều desks.

exercises.title: Practice: Days and Times Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with numbers, days or prepositions.

questions.questionText: Complete: Today is [0]. | My birthday is [1] Tuesday. | The party is [2] three o'clock.
questions.explanation: Monday; on; at — on + ngày, at + giờ.

content.template: Today is [0]. My birthday is [1] Tuesday. The party is [2] three o'clock.

exercises.title: Check: Numbers and Days Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: My birthday is on Tuesday. — on + ngày.

choices.distractorNote: In không dùng với ngày ở Starters

questions.questionText: School starts at eight _____.
questions.explanation: Eight o'clock — số + o'clock.

questions.questionText: Mai is eight. Nam is six. Together they are _____ years old total? (8+6=14 — choose best Starters answer)
questions.explanation: Starters tập trung nhận biết số riêng lẻ; câu đúng nhất: Mai is eight and Nam is six.

choices.text: Mai is eight and Nam is six.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Number Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: Today / is / Monday.
questions.explanation: Today is Monday. — mẫu nói ngày.

questions.questionText: Make: The / party / is / at / three / o'clock.
questions.explanation: The party is at three o'clock.

exercises.title: Review: Numbers and Days Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: Tomorrow is Tuesday. Today is _____.
questions.explanation: Monday — ngày trước Tuesday.

questions.questionText: How many + _____ = How many books?
questions.explanation: How many đi trực tiếp với danh từ số nhiều (books).

questions.questionText: Ten friends come _____ Tuesday.
questions.explanation: On Tuesday — on + ngày.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Mai's Birthday Week
lessons.learningObjective: Read about Mai's week and answer questions about numbers and days.

exercises.title: Learn: Read Mai's Week
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Bài về tuần sinh nhật Mai: hôm nay Monday, mai Tuesday là sinh nhật.

choices.text: Mai's birthday is coming on Tuesday.

questions.questionText: How old is Mai?
questions.explanation: I am eight years old.

exercises.title: Practice: More from the Text
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about days and numbers.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: What day is today in the story?
questions.explanation: Today is Monday.

choices.distractorNote: Từ chung, không phải tên ngày

questions.questionText: When is Mai's birthday?
questions.explanation: Tuesday is my birthday!

choices.distractorNote: Hôm nay chưa phải sinh nhật

exercises.title: Check: Birthday Week Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: How many books do they read at school on Monday?
questions.explanation: We read three books.

questions.questionText: What time is the birthday party?
questions.explanation: At three o'clock.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Facts from the Text
exercises.instructions: Use the text. Match each fact to the correct detail.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Match people and things to facts from the text.
questions.explanation: Mai = eight; Nam = six; Anna = seven; party = ten friends.

exercises.title: Review: Mai's Week Mix
exercises.instructions: Read the text again. Mixed review.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: How many desks are in the class?
questions.explanation: Twenty desks.

questions.questionText: Tomorrow is Tuesday. Today is _____.
questions.explanation: Today is Monday — câu đầu bài.

questions.questionText: How old is Nam?
questions.explanation: My brother Nam is six.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Numbers in the Text
lessons.learningObjective: Find numbers for ages, quantities and time in Mai's birthday text.

exercises.title: Learn: Find Numbers
exercises.instructions: Read Mai's text. Answer about numbers.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: How many friends will come to the party?
questions.explanation: Ten friends will come.

questions.questionText: Anna is _____ years old.
questions.explanation: My friend Anna is seven.

exercises.title: Practice: Ages and Quantities
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about numbers in context.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Which number tells how many desks there are?
questions.explanation: Twenty desks in our class.

questions.questionText: Mai will be eight _____.
questions.explanation: I am eight tomorrow — sinh nhật ngày mai.

choices.distractorNote: Hôm nay còn bảy... thực ra đã eight tomorrow

exercises.title: Check: Numbers Reading Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Put events in order: (1) read books (2) birthday party (3) today is Monday
questions.explanation: Hôm nay Monday → đọc sách → mai tiệc sinh nhật.

choices.distractorNote: Tiệc chưa diễn ra hôm nay

questions.questionText: The biggest number in the text is _____.
questions.explanation: Twenty desks — số lớn nhất trong bài.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Numbers to Meaning
exercises.instructions: Use the text. Match each number to what it counts.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Match numbers to what they describe in the text.
questions.explanation: 3=books; 6=Nam's age; 10=friends; 20=desks.

exercises.title: Review: Numbers Reading Mix
exercises.instructions: Read and answer — mixed review.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Three o'clock is the time of the _____.
questions.explanation: Birthday party at three o'clock.

questions.questionText: Who is the youngest: Mai, Nam or Anna?
questions.explanation: Nam is six — nhỏ nhất (Mai 8, Anna 7).

questions.questionText: At the end, how does Mai feel?
questions.explanation: We are happy!

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Days and Time in Reading
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise days, today and o'clock times in Mai's birthday week text.

exercises.title: Learn: Days and Time
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Answer about days and time.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: School activities on Monday include reading _____ books.
questions.explanation: We read three books on Monday.

questions.questionText: The party is on _____ at three o'clock.
questions.explanation: On Tuesday at three o'clock.

exercises.title: Practice: Today and Tomorrow
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about the timeline.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Why is today special for Mai?
questions.explanation: I am eight tomorrow — sinh nhật sắp tới.

questions.questionText: In 'Today is special', today refers to _____.
questions.explanation: Today is Monday in the story.

exercises.title: Check: Days and Time Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read one more time. Harder questions.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. Today is Monday.

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Which day does Mai read books at school?
questions.explanation: At school on Monday.

questions.questionText: Order the days: (1) birthday (2) today in story
questions.explanation: Today Monday (2) trước birthday Tuesday (1).

exercises.title: Apply: Match Days to Events
exercises.instructions: Match each day or time to an event from the text.

passage.title: Mai's Birthday Week

Tomorrow is Tuesday. Tuesday is my birthday! I am happy. My brother Nam is six. My friend Anna is seven.

At school on Monday, we read three books. Our class has twenty desks.

My birthday party is on Tuesday at three o'clock. Ten friends will come. Today is special because I am eight tomorrow!

questions.questionText: Match days and times to events.
questions.explanation: Monday=read books; Tuesday=party; three o'clock=party time.

exercises.title: Review: Days and Time Mix

questions.questionText: Mai's birthday is on _____.
questions.explanation: Tuesday is my birthday!

questions.explanation: Mai's birthday week — số, ngày và thời gian.

choices.text: Mai's birthday week with numbers and days

questions.questionText: Ten friends come on the day of the _____.
questions.explanation: Ten friends at birthday party on Tuesday.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Write About Age and Days
lessons.learningObjective: Write short phrases about age and days of the week using unit vocabulary.

exercises.title: Learn: Age and Day Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about age and days.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] eight. | [1] is Monday. | How [2] are you?
questions.explanation: am (I am); Today; old (How old).

content.template: I [0] eight. [1] is Monday. How [2] are you?

exercises.title: Practice: Order Age Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: I / am / eight / years / old.
questions.explanation: I am eight years old. — viết tuổi.

questions.questionText: Make: Today / is / Monday.
questions.explanation: Today is Monday. — viết ngày.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Age and Days
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words for each answer.

content.taskDescription: Write about your age and the days of the week using numbers and time words from the unit.
prompts: 1. How old are you? (Write: I am _____.)
2. What day is today? (Write: Today is _____.)
3. Write one sentence with a number: I have _____ books.
successCriteria: Uses at least two unit vocabulary words
Spelling of core words is recognisable

modelAnswer.text: I am eight. Today is Monday. I have three books.

grammar.criteria: Dùng how old/how many và số đếm đúng trong câu ngắn.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ số, ngày và thời gian trong unit.

organization.criteria: Trả lời đúng thứ tự câu hỏi; câu rõ ràng.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành đủ phần; độ dài phù hợp Starters (tối thiểu 5 từ).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Choose the Best Sentence
exercises.instructions: Choose the best written sentence.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about your age:
questions.explanation: I am eight. — đúng ngữ pháp Starters.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about today:
questions.explanation: Today is Monday. — mẫu viết ngày.

exercises.title: Review: Age and Day Writing
exercises.instructions: Complete the writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: How [0] is Nam? | He [1] six. | [2] is Tuesday.
questions.explanation: old; is; Tomorrow or Today — Tomorrow is Tuesday trong bài.

content.template: How [0] is Nam? He [1] six. [2] is Tuesday.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Write About Birthdays
lessons.learningObjective: Write short sentences about birthdays, days and o'clock times.

exercises.title: Learn: Birthday Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence about birthdays.

questions.questionText: Complete: My [0] is on Tuesday. | The party is at three [1]. | [2] friends will come.
questions.explanation: birthday; o'clock; Ten — theo bài Mai.

content.template: My [0] is on Tuesday. The party is at three [1]. [2] friends will come.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Birthday Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put words in order to make sentences.

questions.questionText: Make: Happy / birthday, / Mai!
questions.explanation: Happy birthday, Mai! — lời chúc.

questions.questionText: Make: The / party / is / at / three / o'clock.
questions.explanation: The party is at three o'clock.

exercises.title: Check: Write About a Birthday
exercises.instructions: Write short answers about a birthday.

content.taskDescription: Write about Mai's birthday week. Use numbers, days and time words.
prompts: 2. What time is the party? (Write: at _____ o'clock)
3. How many friends come? (Write: ten / five / three)
successCriteria: Uses a day word and a number
Uses o'clock or a time phrase

modelAnswer.text: on Tuesday at three o'clock ten friends

grammar.criteria: Dùng how old/how many và số đếm đúng trong câu ngắn.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ số, ngày và thời gian trong unit.

organization.criteria: Trả lời đúng thứ tự câu hỏi; câu rõ ràng.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành đủ phần; độ dài phù hợp Starters (tối thiểu 5 từ).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: More Birthday Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] birthday, Anna! | [1] is my birthday. | I am [2] today!
questions.explanation: Happy; Today; eight — câu tiệc sinh nhật.

content.template: [0] birthday, Anna! [1] is my birthday. I am [2] today!

exercises.title: Review: Birthday Writing Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best sentence.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about a birthday day:
questions.explanation: My birthday is on Tuesday. — on + ngày.

questions.questionText: Best time phrase for a party:
questions.explanation: At three o'clock. — at + giờ.

questions.questionText: Which sentence uses ten correctly?
questions.explanation: Ten friends come. — số lượng.

choices.text: Ten friends come to my party.

questions.explanation: How many books do you have?

exercises.instructions: Write short answers using numbers.

content.taskDescription: Write short answers about ages and quantities.
prompts: 1. How old is Nam? (Write: He is _____.)
2. How many books does Mai read? (Write: three / five / ten)

grammar.criteria: Dùng how old/how many và số đếm đúng trong câu ngắn.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ số, ngày và thời gian trong unit.

organization.criteria: Trả lời đúng thứ tự câu hỏi; câu rõ ràng.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành đủ phần; độ dài phù hợp Starters (tối thiểu 5 từ).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Write With Numbers
exercises.instructions: Complete the gap-fill writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: How [0] pencils? | I have [1]. | Our class has [2] desks.
questions.explanation: many; five; twenty — how many + số.

content.template: How [0] pencils? I have [1]. Our class has [2] desks.

exercises.title: Review: Numbers Writing Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose or complete number writing frames.

questions.questionText: Best answer: How many friends?
questions.explanation: Ten friends. — trả lời số lượng.

questions.questionText: Nam is six. Best written sentence:
questions.explanation: He is six. — viết tuổi người khác.

questions.questionText: Which is correct?
questions.explanation: It is three o'clock. — viết giờ.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Talk About Age and Days
lessons.learningObjective: Answer simple questions about age and days with short phrases.

exercises.title: Learn: What to Say About Age
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's classroom on Monday. Mai is eight. Her brother Nam is six. Her friend Anna is seven. Tomorrow is Tuesday — Mai's birthday. The party will be at three o'clock. Ten friends will come.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: How old are you? You say:
questions.explanation: I am eight. — trả lời tuổi.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What day is today? You say:
questions.explanation: Today is Monday. — nói ngày.

exercises.title: Practice: Age and Day Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's classroom on Monday. Mai is eight. Her brother Nam is six. Her friend Anna is seven. Tomorrow is Tuesday — Mai's birthday. The party will be at three o'clock. Ten friends will come.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks: How old is Nam? You say:
questions.explanation: He is six. — tuổi Nam.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: When is your birthday? You say:
questions.explanation: On Tuesday. / My birthday is on Tuesday.

exercises.title: Check: Age Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions. Say at least one word for each question.

content.prompt: The examiner will ask you about ages and numbers. Answer in short phrases.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai's classroom on Monday. Mai is eight. Her brother Nam is six. Her friend Anna is seven. Tomorrow is Tuesday — Mai's birthday. The party will be at three o'clock. Ten friends will come.
followUpQuestions: How old is your brother or sister?
How many books do you have?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Số (one–twenty), ngày (Monday, Tuesday) và o'clock nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng how old/how many hoặc I am / I have trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Age Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Anna asks: How old are you today? (birthday) You say:
questions.explanation: I am eight today! — sinh nhật.

questions.questionText: You want to say tomorrow is Tuesday. You say:
questions.explanation: Tomorrow is Tuesday.

exercises.title: Review: Age and Days Speaking
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken reply.

questions.questionText: Introduce Anna's age. You say:
questions.explanation: She is seven. — tuổi Anna.

questions.questionText: Say how many books you read. You say:
questions.explanation: Three books. / I read three books.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks: How many pencils? You say:
questions.explanation: Five. / I have five pencils.

questions.questionText: The party is at three _____. You say:
questions.explanation: At three o'clock.

exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say at the party.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's classroom on Monday. Mai is eight. Her brother Nam is six. Her friend Anna is seven. Tomorrow is Tuesday — Mai's birthday. The party will be at three o'clock. Ten friends will come.

questions.questionText: Anna asks: How many friends are here? You say:
questions.explanation: Ten friends. — số lượng bạn.

questions.questionText: Nam says the party starts at three o'clock. You repeat:
questions.explanation: The party starts at three o'clock.

choices.text: The party starts at three o'clock.

exercises.instructions: Answer about Mai's birthday party.

content.prompt: Read the scene about Mai's birthday week. The examiner asks about the party.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai's classroom on Monday. Mai is eight. Her brother Nam is six. Her friend Anna is seven. Tomorrow is Tuesday — Mai's birthday. The party will be at three o'clock. Ten friends will come.
followUpQuestions: How many friends come to the party?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Số (one–twenty), ngày (Monday, Tuesday) và o'clock nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng how old/how many hoặc I am / I have trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Party Speaking
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: You tell Anna today is Tuesday. You say:
questions.explanation: Today is Tuesday.

questions.questionText: You thank Anna for the birthday wish. You say:
questions.explanation: Thank you, Anna! — như trong script.

exercises.title: Review: Party Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase.

questions.questionText: Say when the party is. You say:
questions.explanation: At three o'clock on Tuesday.

questions.questionText: How many friends at Mai's party? You say:
questions.explanation: Ten friends come to my party.

choices.text: Ten friends come to my party.

questions.questionText: It is a great day! You say:
questions.explanation: Today is Tuesday. It is a great day! — như Anna.

choices.text: Today is Tuesday. It is a great day!

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Numbers and Time Speaking
lessons.learningObjective: Choose and say appropriate short replies about numbers and time.

exercises.title: Learn: Number and Time Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply in each situation.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks: How many books? You say:
questions.explanation: Three books. / I have three books.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: What time is the party? You say:
questions.explanation: At three o'clock.

exercises.title: Practice: More Number Situations
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say.

questions.questionText: Examiner: How many desks in your class? You say:
questions.explanation: Twenty desks. — từ bài đọc.

questions.questionText: You count: one, two, three, four, _____. You say:
questions.explanation: Five — thứ tự đếm.

questions.questionText: You finish talking about numbers happily. You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — kết thúc tích cực.

exercises.title: Check: Numbers and Time Speaking
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions in short phrases.

content.prompt: The examiner asks everyday questions about numbers, days and time.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai's classroom on Monday. Mai is eight. Her brother Nam is six. Her friend Anna is seven. Tomorrow is Tuesday — Mai's birthday. The party will be at three o'clock. Ten friends will come.
followUpQuestions: How many pencils do you have?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Số (one–twenty), ngày (Monday, Tuesday) và o'clock nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng how old/how many hoặc I am / I have trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Number Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Someone says: Nice party! You say:
questions.explanation: Thank you! — phản hồi lịch sự.

choices.distractorNote: Không phải câu trả lời phù hợp

questions.questionText: Teacher points to the clock at three. You say:
questions.explanation: It is three o'clock.

exercises.title: Review: Numbers Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

questions.questionText: How old is Anna? You say:
questions.explanation: She is seven.

questions.questionText: Say one sentence about today. You say:
questions.explanation: Today is Monday. — mẫu câu ngày.

questions.questionText: Your brother is six. You say:
questions.explanation: He is six. / My brother is six.
